# GBE Awards Homepage Behaviors

Captured from https://gbeaward.com/ on 2026-06-18T13:03:16.329Z.

## Header Scroll State
```json
{
  "topStyles": {
    "scrollY": 0,
    "backgroundColor": "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)",
    "boxShadow": "none",
    "position": "static",
    "transform": "none",
    "height": "150px"
  },
  "scrolledStyles": {
    "scrollY": 240,
    "backgroundColor": "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)",
    "boxShadow": "none",
    "position": "static",
    "transform": "none",
    "height": "150px"
  }
}
```
